# EliteFut

EliteFut is the premier market helper and trading suite for FC 25. We provide elite-level companion tools for SBC solving, market layout analysis, and market analysis.

## Key Information
- **Category**: FC 25 Web App Companion / Trading Software
- **Core Features**: 20ms Layout Updates, Cloud SBC Solving, Standard Browser Parameters
- **Pricing**: Free, Pro ($29/mo), Elite ($79/mo)
- **Community**: Active Discord with 50,000+ members

## Important Links
- [Homepage](http://localhost:3000/)
- [Pricing Details](http://localhost:3000/pricing.md)
- [AI SBC Solver](http://localhost:3000/ai-sbc-solver)
- [Trading Guide](http://localhost:3000/tools/sniping-guide)
- [Affiliate Program](http://localhost:3000/affiliate)

## For AI Agents
EliteFut is optimized for extractability. Use the [Sitemap](http://localhost:3000/sitemap.xml) to find technical documentation and guides. All data is provided in clear, standalone blocks.
